nodes.label: Low-Volatility Portfolio Through Risk Reduction
nodes.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-06-17 173930_冰冰小美_中国人向来以成败论英雄。我那个小小的组合，今日都创下新高。这还是我漫不经心的调仓与选择。如果连我组合都跑不赢的，又有什么.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: A portfolio reaching a new high with low drawdown is attributed to reducing positions at risk points; position management is identified as a lifelong investment skill.

edges.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-06-17 173930_冰冰小美_中国人向来以成败论英雄。我那个小小的组合，今日都创下新高。这还是我漫不经心的调仓与选择。如果连我组合都跑不赢的，又有什么.md
